## Summary

- describe the user-facing or technical intent
- identify the main modules or workflows touched

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant automated tests were added or updated
- [ ] Local validation was run for the touched area
- [ ] Documentation was updated where behavior or architecture changed

## Review Focus

- invariants and error handling
- file-format compatibility and round-trip safety
- architecture boundary compliance
- regression risk for plot/table editing workflows
